title: When Items are created with automation based on status change, do you need to manually configure mirror column setting?
excerpt:

posts.author: Juneshin1 (Leejune)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Current board configuration include one master portfolio board that lays out all the ongoing project. I have an automation set up that allows change of status to create a new board based on the template. This new board has a automation set up when a status of a certain column change into something, create a item with a connection on a master board. Even though the template and the master board had a mirrored column configured, the new board does go not automatically checks all the applicable columns in customize mirror columns. Is it possible to get this setup automatically configured when new boards is created?

posts.author: Annabel40 (Annabel Lai-Fang)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m not sure i completely understand but this may help…
In the premade automations in the section Item creation look for this automation. I have used this to automate setting up the mirror column on my boards
